can_receive_sms_transactional.description: Whether or not this profile is subscribed to receive transactional SMS.

consent.description: The consent status for SMS Transactional.

consent_timestamp.description: The timestamp when consent was recorded or updated for Transactional SMS messaging , in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm).

method.description: The method by which the profile was subscribed to Transactional SMS messaging .

method_detail.description: Additional details about the method which the profile was subscribed to Transactional SMS messaging. This may be empty if no details were provided.

last_updated.description: The timestamp when the SMS consent record was last modified, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm).
